title: Pipeline Test — Do Not Post
voiceover_text: What if I told you that the thing keeping most people from building real income isn't skill, and it isn't money. It's leverage. Leverage is when your effort today keeps paying you without you doing the work again. AI tools are the cheapest leverage stack most people have ever had access to. A $20 per month subscription to a single tool can replace contractors charging three thousand dollars a month. I've spent the last year documenting exactly which tools, which systems, and which combinations actually convert. Follow The Leverage Stack and I'll show you one piece at a time.
caption:
AI tools aren't just for tech bros. They're the cheapest leverage play most people will ever see.

A $20/month subscription replacing a $3,000/month contractor isn't a flex. It's a system shift.

I document what actually works. Save this and follow for the breakdown.
